title: Product portfolio analysis
summary: 9609 AS — Boston Matrix and managing a product portfolio.
learningObjectives: Suggest strategies for stars, cash cows, etc.

simpleExplanation.title: Balancing the product range
simpleExplanation.summary: Firms manage multiple products at different life-cycle stages. Portfolio tools guide investment and divestment.
steps: Cash cows: high share, low growth.
Question marks: low share, high growth.

sections.content: **Portfolio analysis** (3.3.3) uses the **Boston Matrix**. Place **case products** in quadrants with **justified strategy**.
